{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Monarch’s platform
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Some members of [[Charity]]'s family are on the [[Monarch’s platform]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
